name: speednet-proxy
description: SpeedNet Proxy — all-in-one VLESS/Trojan/Shadowsocks proxy panel on a Cloudflare Worker (D1, users, Telegram bot, WARP, optional backend mode).

DB.description: The D1 database SpeedNet uses for storage. Cloudflare creates this automatically — keep the default. SpeedNet builds its own tables on first run, no migration needed.

PASSWORD.description: Optional. Leave blank — after deploy, open your Worker URL and the **/install** wizard asks you to set an admin password. You can also set it later under Settings → Variables.

UUID.description: Optional. Leave blank — SpeedNet auto-derives a UUID. Only set this if you want a specific VLESS UUID.
